breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome's Eclipse Prediction Engine Breaks Its Own Sun Model
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: The dome's 2026 eclipse predictions (E001-E009) explicitly use H(r)-derived FSF values — the same seasonal height function that makes the dome's physical sun position indeterminate across 39 eclipses. The dome has bet its future predictions on a function that invalidates its past claims.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Direct self-contradiction between dome's prospective predictions and its retrospective claims, using the dome's own published formulas.
